description_long: This motorcycle features a classic cruiser design with a light blue body, chrome accents, and a tan leather seat. The front showcases a large circular headlight flanked by two rearview mirrors and wide handlebars, giving it a robust and vintage appearance. The side profile reveals a teardrop-shaped fuel tank, prominent engine block, and dual exhaust pipes on the right side. Both wheels are equipped with thick, white-walled tires and spoked rims, enhancing its retro aesthetic. The rear includes a small fender, taillight, and dual exhaust outlets, while the overall build suggests a comfortable ride for urban cruising. The materials and finish evoke a blend of durability and style, suitable for city streets and neighborhood rides.
description: A classic cruiser-style motorcycle with a light blue body, chrome details, and a tan leather seat, featuring wide handlebars and white-walled tires.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular headlight, wide handlebars, and both rearview mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the teardrop fuel tank, tan seat, and chrome engine details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tan seat, rear fender, taillight, and dual exhaust pipes.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the dual exhaust pipes, engine block, and overall cruiser profile.
